caption: A man sits in a recording studio, wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie featuring the gold text "BOSS TALK." He is positioned behind a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white wall adorned with a repeated logo that reads "UNICORN HUSTLE" accompanied by five stars. On the wall, blue text reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk in front of him sits a black mug with red and white text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD." A small logo with the text "BOSS TALK" is visible in the lower-left corner. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and slightly turned to his left, maintaining a consistent posture and facial expression while facing an unseen person off-camera. The scene is static, with no significant changes in movement or camera angle across the frames.
